product_title: Smart True Hepa Air Purifier With App Control (covers Up To 770 Sq Ft)
consensus_summary: This Nordstrom smart air purifier receives generally positive reviews for its large coverage area, effective HEPA filtration, and convenient app control features. Users appreciate the quiet operation and air quality monitoring capabilities. Some concerns exist around filter replacement costs and occasional connectivity issues with the app.
pros: Covers large 770 sq ft area effectively
True HEPA filtration captures allergens and particles
App control and monitoring features convenient
cons: Higher noise on maximum fan speed
red_flags: App disconnection problems affecting remote control reliability
High ongoing filter costs may deter budget users
